encounters.name: Ambush at the Mine Entrance
encounters.description: As the party descends into Irondeep Hold, the mine entrance becomes a killing zone. Four skeleton miners, once the townsfolk they now haunt, rise from the shadows with pickaxes raised. Two zombie miners lumber behind them, slow but relentless. A spectral mine cart, driven by unseen forces, careens down the tracks toward the party — a deadly reminder of the collapse that sealed dozens underground.

encounters.name: The Armory Skirmish
encounters.description: Thorgar sends his elite guard to stop the party in the dwarven armory. Lieutenant Varn, a death knight of terrible power, leads the assault alongside two wights and four skeleton elites. The armory is filled with ancient weapons on racks — characters can grab weapons as bonus actions, turning the environment into an advantage. The battle is tactical and dangerous, testing the party's coordination and resource management.

encounters.name: The Inner Sanctum
encounters.description: Thorgar Ironfist awaits in the inner sanctum of the ancient tomb, flanked by four wights and two wraiths. The sanctum is a chamber of molten metal pools and crumbling pillars — environmental hazards that add danger to every round. The Clan Heart glows at the chamber's center, powering Thorgar's undeath. Destroying it requires a DC 15 Strength check or a spell like disintegrate. During the battle, Thorgar recognizes the Mountain Dwarf Ranger's clan bloodline and offers them a choice that could change the course of the fight.
